human_actions_pending.context: Verify pairing code flow, authorization, rate limiting, and all protected input channels (slash commands, buttons, direct messages). See TEST-PLAN.md.

decisions.decision: Separate /auth command instead of modifying /remote on
decisions.rationale: Keeps concerns separated; authorization is distinct from enabling sync. Easier to evolve independently.
Simpler; only one Discord user needs to control the session. Multi-user not required.

decisions.decision: Silent block for unauthorized direct messages
decisions.rationale: Discord messages cannot be ephemerally replied from bot-to-user context; rejecting silently avoids confusion but may be perceived as bug. Could change to public ❌ reaction.

next_action: Execute manual test scenarios from .planning/phases/05-secure-session-management/05-TEST-PLAN.md and verify all acceptance criteria. Then mark task #21 as complete and consider next steps (e.g., npm publishing).
context_notes: Implementation complete, all code pushed to GitHub. Authorization system functional. Awaiting UAT before finalizing v2.1.0 release. Tests are automated for ApprovalManager; end-to-end manual tests pending.
